memoryArtifacts.headline: Blason de la Maison de Toucy
memoryArtifacts.description:
Blason de la Maison de Toucy
De gueules, à trois pals de vair, au chef d'or chargé de quatre merlettes de gueules.

zh.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy是Ithier I de Toucy的兒子，於1066年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希。他於1090年與Mathilde de Saint Omer結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世在巴勒斯坦。

zh-hans.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh-hans.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy是Ithier I de Toucy的儿子，于1066年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希。他于1090年与Mathilde de Saint Omer结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世在巴勒斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy was born in 1066, in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France as the son of Ithier I de Toucy. He married Mathilde de Saint Omer in 1090. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy est né en 1066, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, fils de Ithier I de Toucy. Il a épousé Mathilde de Saint Omer en 1090. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé à Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy wurde 1066 in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich, als Sohn von Ithier I de Toucy geboren. Er hat 1090 Mathilde de Saint Omer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy è nato il nel 1066 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia come figlio di Ithier I de Toucy. Lui sposato Mathilde de Saint Omer nel 1090. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel Palestina.

ja.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントウシ
ja.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントウシ
ja.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucyは1066年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントウシでIthier I de Toucyの息子として生まれた。1090年にMathilde de Saint Omerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はパレスチナで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy(은)는 1066년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 토우시에서 Ithier I de Toucy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1090년 Mathilde de Saint Omer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 팔레스타인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy nasceu em 1066, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França filho de Ithier I de Toucy. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Saint Omer em 1090. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em Palestina.

ru.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy родился в 1066 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Его отца звали Ithier I de Toucy. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Saint Omer в 1090 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в местности Палестина.

es.lifeSummary: Narjot II de Toucy nació en 1066, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia como hijo de Ithier I de Toucy. Se casó con Mathilde de Saint Omer en 1090. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en Palestina.
